# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](http://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/)
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](http://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.0.5] - 2026-04-05

### Added

*   Support for GitHub gitignore repository as primary source for template generation
*   Individual template fetching from GitHub with fallback to APIs
*   Configurable VSCode settings for all extension parameters:
    *   Banner message customization
    *   Custom rules header text
    *   Auto-generated section header text
    *   Primary and fallback API URLs
    *   GitHub repository URL
    *   Preference toggle for GitHub vs API sources

## [1.0.4] - 2025-07-12

### Added

*   Information about Cursor support

## [1.0.3] - 2021-03-03

### Added

*   Alternative API Endpoint URL to bypass Cloudflare Protection

## [1.0.2] - 2020-06-08

### Changed

*   New API Endpoint URL

## [1.0.1] - 2018-04-20

### Changed

*   New icon

## [1.0.0] - 2018-04-16

*   Initial release
